Supporters of PMS 'medical validity claim support from work on the similar problem, Premenstrual dysphoric disorder (" PMDD ").
Premenstrual dysphoric disorder (PMDD) is the most severe form of PMS, with the prominence anger, irritability, and internal tension.
Now, the Food and Drug Administration has approved the drug for treating premenstrual dysphoric disorder, a serious form of premenstrual syndrome.
